name: R Bookdown Project
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y cmake make g++ gcc libcurl4-openssl-dev libssl-dev libxml2-dev pandoc libfontconfig1-dev libfreetype6-dev libharfbuzz-dev libfribidi-dev libpng-dev libjpeg-dev libtiff5-dev && R -e "install.packages(c('fs','sass','bslib','rmarkdown','bookdown','knitr','tidyverse','janitor','skimr','DT','kableExtra','broom','ggplot2','readr','here'), repos='https://cloud.r-project.org')"
